$comment: The UI boundary (ADR-APP-026). Project-owned: every project has different dependencies, so this file is never pinned and never delivered by governance:update. EVERY runtime dependency must appear in exactly one list, or `npm run lint` fails — that is what makes the rule a gate instead of a reminder.

notes.@tauri-apps/api: The IPC boundary to the Rust backend. Renders nothing.
notes.lucide-react: Icon glyphs — SVG paths, no chrome, no behaviour, and they inherit the surrounding colour. An icon is not a control; the control around it is a primitive.
notes._no_webfonts: Huginn draws in the system face (ADR-PROJ-003), so the @fontsource packages the template shipped with — Inter, JetBrains Mono, Orbitron — were removed with the neon HUD. A font is view-safe if one is ever added back.
notes._primitiveOnly_is_empty: Huginn installs no UI library — every control is drawn from scratch in src/components/ui/. The day one is added it belongs here, and ESLint will then refuse to let a view import it.
notes.i18next: The translation engine. Holds strings and swaps them; renders nothing.
notes.react-i18next: Binds i18next to React (useTranslation). A hook, not a control — it puts no surface on screen.
